retry_reason: The puts are unconditional and always succeed; retrying would cause double-puts and use-after-free.
contract_summary: This function releases all reference-counted translation table request nodes held in the request list. It iterates over the list, removes each node, and calls batadv_tt_req_node_put to decrement its reference count. The caller must hold the req_list_lock before calling this function. After return, the list is empty and all node references are released. This function is typically invoked during cleanup or shutdown. The caller must ensure no other context still uses the nodes after this call.
